allow: Bash(# Get just the vulnerability count from Trivy trivy fs --format json --quiet /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/control-front-repo)

Bash(# Test Semgrep on target repo \(limit to a few key files to test quickly\) cd /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/control-front-repo && semgrep --config auto --json --timeout 60 --max-target-bytes 1000000 packages/app/src/sagas/)

Bash(# Semgrep is installed in the venv - need to use the full path or activate venv which semgrep || echo ""Not in PATH"" ls /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/SecurityTesting/venv/bin/semgrep && echo ""Found in venv"" # Try with pip-installed path /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/SecurityTesting/venv/bin/semgrep --version || pip3 show semgrep)
Bash(# Test RetireJS on target repo retire --js --outputformat json --path /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/control-front-repo/packages/app/src/)

Bash(# RetireJS found no vulnerable JS libs \(scans source .js files for embedded libraries\). # This is normal for a modern React app using npm packages. # Let''s also check the node_modules for known vulnerable packages retire --path /Users/alekseymerzlyakov/Tests/control-front-repo/node_modules/ --outputformat json --severity low)
Bash(# Kill any existing processes on ports 8000 and 5173 lsof -ti:8000)
Bash(# Check if backend is up curl -s http://localhost:8000/health)
Bash(# Kill the broken process lsof -ti:8000)
Bash(# Kill and restart backend lsof -ti:8000)
Bash(# Frontend might need to be restarted - kill and restart lsof -ti:5173)
Bash(sleep 2 bash -c "source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=$PWD uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > data/backend.log 2>&1 &" sleep 3)
Bash(true bash -c "source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=$PWD uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 >> data/backend.log 2>&1 &" sleep 4)

Bash(# Запустить новый curl и сразу проверить stderr нового процесса через log curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/reports/3/summarize 2>&1 sleep 1 # Посмотреть все логи процесса 36507 grep -c """" /proc/36507/fd/1 || echo ""no proc fs"" # На macOS — читаем через lsof что пишет процесс lsof -p 36507 | grep -E ""log|txt|out"")
Bash(true bash -c "source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=$PWD uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > data/backend_new.log 2>&1 &" sleep 4)
Bash(true bash -c "source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=$PWD uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 > data/backend_new.log 2>&1 &" sleep 5)

Bash(# ESLint 10 — flat config, нет --no-eslintrc, нужно --no-config-lookup # Проверим что плагин security поддерживает flat config bash -c ""source venv/bin/activate && node -e \\"" const security = require\(''eslint-plugin-security''\); console.log\(''security plugin keys:'', Object.keys\(security\)\); console.log\(''has configs:'', !!security.configs\); console.log\(''has flatConfig:'', !!security.configs?.recommended\); \\"""" || echo ""no node in venv"" node -e ""const s = require\(''eslint-plugin-security''\); console.log\(''keys:'', Object.keys\(s\)\); console.log\(''flat?'', !!s.configs?.recommended\);"" 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 2 bash -c "source venv/bin/activate && PYTHONPATH=$PWD uvicorn backend.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 >> data/backend_new.log 2>&1 &" sleep 5)
